title: acrostichum costatum
intro: Acrostichum costatum is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Acrostichum costatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, where it is steeped in hot water to release its active compounds and benefits.
